description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic form. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a covered balcony with outdoor seating, accessible by a set of steps. The exterior is finished in a dark color with contrasting white window frames, and the house is surrounded by several palm trees, giving it a contemporary tropical feel. The side and rear facades have large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The ground level includes a patio area enclosed by a low fence, and the landscaping is clean and open. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered balcony, surrounded by palm trees and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with steps, large windows, a covered balcony with seating, and palm trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a solid wall with large grid windows and visible outdoor furniture on the balcony and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a fenced patio area, symmetrical window arrangement, and dense palm tree landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window, visible balcony, and the continuation of the patio and palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and symmetrical grid pattern
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, large glass door, covered balcony above, and minimalistic landscaping with palm trees.
